THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCNIE, DOUGLAS DBA MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, SCOTT DBA HOUSING CORPS, INC. SANCHEZ, ANDRES PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET BURDEN IN ESTABLISHING THE UNDERLYING ACTION. IT WAS PURSUED TO A LEGAL TERMINATION IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR IN THAT DISMISSAL FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION DOES NOT INVOLVE THE MERITS AND DOES NOT CONSTITUTE A FAVORABLE TERMINATION.
